Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heralds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Six great Heralds gathered to inspect the Ghostwater pocket world.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Heralds are a level of power or entity mentioned by Yerin.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Heralds dropped their veils.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Many Heralds have made strange comments about the Ninecloud team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — A victory for Mercy would show the Heralds that the Akura clan is stronger than the gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Heralds do not engage in open blows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Moving many Heralds has a cost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Heralds would kill Fury and Mercy if Yerin loses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Heralds might not interfere with one Underlord running around while in their grip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Heralds are only half spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Heralds combine with their Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Heralds historically wore badges of red.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Heralds focus their willpower inwardly to enhance their own power beyond all limitations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Infusing techniques with willpower is not the exclusive domain of Sages and Heralds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The unaffiliated Heralds occasionally answer to Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Heralds find it difficult to comprehend Sage techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Heralds are peers to Eithan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — It is difficult to deal spiritual damage to Heralds such that they die without leaving a Remnant.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Heralds are powerful entities that require willpower to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Heralds are a level of power or stage in Sacred Valley.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
